text.title: ai-in-project-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-in-project-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Reporting AI productivity gains based on issue velocity or PR count alone.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These metrics improve while deployment frequency and lead time stay flat; management acts on misleading signals and invests in more AI tooling instead of fixing the review bottleneck.

failure-mode.description: Using AI status reports as the sole input for executive project health briefings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI reports can be accurate on measurable metrics but contextually misleading without narrative that explains anomalies, team dynamics, and qualitative risk factors that only humans can observe.
